    <item>
      <title>Pistons avoid elimination vs. Magic behind Cade Cunningham's historic performance</title>
      <description>As the Orlando Magic stormed back in the final six minutes, the Detroit Pistons couldn't get baskets from anyone but Cade Cunningham. So their All-Star guard did it himself.</description>
      <pubDate>29 Apr 2026 21:38:45 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/pistons_avoid_elimination_vs_magic_behind_cade_cunninghams_historic_performance/s1_13132_43788568</link>

        <media:credit> Rick Osentoski-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Detroit Pistons guard Cade Cunningham (2) dribbles in the second half against the Orlando Magic during Game 5 of the first round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Little Caesars Arena. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Orlando Magic</category>
      <category>Detroit Pistons</category>
      <category>Paolo Banchero</category>

    <item>
      <title>Cavaliers ride hot hand of Dennis Schroder to take pivotal Game 5 against Raptors</title>
      <description>Even a poor defensive performance in the first half could not keep the Cleveland Cavaliers from making it five wins in as many games for the home team in the first-round series against the Toronto Raptors with Wednesday's 125-120 comeback win.</description>
      <pubDate>29 Apr 2026 22:17:04 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/cavaliers_ride_hot_hand_of_dennis_schroder_to_take_pivotal_game_5_against_raptors/s1_13132_43788636</link>

      <author>Colby Colwell, Yardbarker</author>
      <media:content url="http://www.yardbarker.com/media/9/6/9682e9d8205e358d542efe2465f526ac096a8c02/thumb_16x9/cavaliers-ride-hot-hand-dennis-schroder-pivotal.jpg">
        <media:credit> David Richard-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Cleveland Cavaliers guard Dennis Schroder (8) drives to the basket beside Toronto Raptors forward Scottie Barnes (4) in the fourth quarter of Game 5 of the first round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Rocket Arena. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Cleveland Cavaliers</category>
      <category>Toronto Raptors</category>
      <category>Dennis Schroder</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Reed Sheppard's clutch play late helps Rockets stave off elimination vs. Lakers on LeBron James' historic night</title>
      <description>A historic night from LeBron James and the long-awaited return of Austin Reaves were still not enough to prevent the short-handed Houston Rockets from taking Wednesday's Game 5.</description>

      </media:content>

    <item>
      <title>Is it time for star Devin Booker, Phoenix Suns to split?</title>
      <description>The Phoenix Suns and Devin Booker saw their 2026 postseason end early, falling to the reigning NBA champion Oklahoma City Thunder in the first round. The Suns exceeded expectations, but the franchise has struggled to replicate the success of an NBA Finals appearance in 2021. </description>
      <pubDate>29 Apr 2026 14:45:27 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/is_it_time_for_star_devin_booker_phoenix_suns_to_split/s1_13132_43786432</link>

      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>

    </item>

      <title>Another Victor Wembanyama block party sends Trail Blazers home</title>

    <item>
      <title>Joel Embiid keeps 76ers alive with massive Game 5 effort</title>
      <description>A limited Embiid was good enough to stave off elimination for the Philadelphia 76ers in their 113-97 win over the Boston Celtics.</description>
